news.title:
HDFC Life approves FY26 results, proposes ₹1,000 Cr equity issue.
Recommended ₹2.10/share dividend, reappoints ED & CFO for 5 years.
news.summary:
HDFC Life approves FY26 results, proposes ₹1,000 Cr equity issue.
Recommended ₹2.10/share dividend, reappoints ED & CFO for 5 years.

news.title: HDFC Life Q4 results set to release; VNB expected to drop 8%.
news.summary: HDFC Life Q4 results set to release; VNB expected to drop 8%.

news.title:
Wipro, HDFC Life, HDFC AMC, CRISIL, Angel One among firms announcing Q4 results today.
Stocks in focus include HDBFS, ICICI Lombard, Elecon, Hathway, and Tejas Networks.
news.summary:
Wipro, HDFC Life, HDFC AMC, CRISIL, Angel One among firms announcing Q4 results today.

news.title:
HDFC Life Insurance Q4 earnings highlight margin pressure concerns.
Key triggers for HDFC Life Insurance's performance remain in focus.
news.summary:
HDFC Life Insurance Q4 earnings highlight margin pressure concerns.
Key triggers for HDFC Life Insurance's performance remain in focus.

news.title:
HDFC Life Q4 preview shows flat growth, policy sales slowed; profit seen at Rs 480 crore.
VNB margin to dip to 24.8% from 26.5%; product mix offers stability with traction in traditional plans.
news.summary:
HDFC Life Q4 preview shows flat growth, policy sales slowed; profit seen at Rs 480 crore.
VNB margin to dip to 24.8% from 26.5%; product mix offers stability with traction in traditional plans.

news.title:
Macquarie favors HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank due to attractive valuations amid margin pressures in India's banking sector.
HDFC Life and SBI Life are also preferred. PSU banks face weak Q4 due to treasury losses and tight liquidity.
news.summary:
Macquarie favors HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank due to attractive valuations amid margin pressures in India's banking sector.
HDFC Life and SBI Life are also preferred. PSU banks face weak Q4 due to treasury losses and tight liquidity.

news.title:
Axis Capital upgrades HDFC Life to Buy with a target of ₹750, down from ₹840.
Upgrade reflects soft growth, capped APE growth, stable VNB margins, and favorable risk-reward.
news.summary:
Axis Capital upgrades HDFC Life to Buy with a target of ₹750, down from ₹840.
Upgrade reflects soft growth, capped APE growth, stable VNB margins, and favorable risk-reward.

news.title:
HDFC Life and ICICI Pru Life report a 1% decline in March Retail APE.
Axis Max Life sees a 7% increase in March Retail APE, per sources.
news.summary:
HDFC Life and ICICI Pru Life report a 1% decline in March Retail APE.
Axis Max Life sees a 7% increase in March Retail APE, per sources.

news.title:
HDFC Life's FY26 APE growth at 8% missed its 13% guidance.
The company significantly missed its FY26 APE target.
news.summary:
HDFC Life's FY26 APE growth at 8% missed its 13% guidance.
The company significantly missed its FY26 APE target.

news.title: HDFCLife board to review fund-raising proposal via preferential issue on April 16.
news.summary: HDFCLife board to review fund-raising proposal via preferential issue on April 16.

news.title:
HSBC revises target prices for insurance stocks; highlights preference for market leaders like HDFC Life, ICICI Prudential, and SBI Life.
SBI Life target set at Rs 2,300 (+24.9%), ICICI Lombard at Rs 2,200 (+27.4%), PB Fintech at Rs 1,980 (+35.6%).
news.summary:
HSBC revises target prices for insurance stocks; highlights preference for market leaders like HDFC Life, ICICI Prudential, and SBI Life.
SBI Life target set at Rs 2,300 (+24.9%), ICICI Lombard at Rs 2,200 (+27.4%), PB Fintech at Rs 1,980 (+35.6%).

news.title:
Nifty 50 and Sensex rebounded as US-Iran ceasefire led Nifty to rise 3.5% to 23,938 and Sensex 3.7% to 77,392.
Large-cap stocks like DLF, M&M, HDFC Life, LIC, Adani Ports, ICICI Bank show potential upside up to 63% amid valuation gaps.
news.summary:
Nifty 50 and Sensex rebounded as US-Iran ceasefire led Nifty to rise 3.5% to 23,938 and Sensex 3.7% to 77,392.
Large-cap stocks like DLF, M&M, HDFC Life, LIC, Adani Ports, ICICI Bank show potential upside up to 63% amid valuation gaps.

news.title:
HDFC Life schedules earnings call on Apr 16, 2026, at 17:00 IST.
Call will discuss financial results; audio to be available online.
news.summary:
HDFC Life schedules earnings call on Apr 16, 2026, at 17:00 IST.
Call will discuss financial results; audio to be available online.

news.title:
Nearly 30 Nifty stocks declined, including HDFCLife, Sun Pharma, DRL, NTPC, and Cipla.
Top gainers were Hindalco, Trent, BEL, Tech Mahindra, and Titan.
news.summary:
Nearly 30 Nifty stocks declined, including HDFCLife, Sun Pharma, DRL, NTPC, and Cipla.
Top gainers were Hindalco, Trent, BEL, Tech Mahindra, and Titan.

news.title:
LIC, HDFC Life, Bajaj Finserv, ICICI Pru hit 52-week lows amid a 14%-24% monthly decline.
IRDAI reforms, digital transformation, and product innovation may drive long-term recovery in insurance.
news.summary:
LIC, HDFC Life, Bajaj Finserv, ICICI Pru hit 52-week lows amid a 14%-24% monthly decline.
IRDAI reforms, digital transformation, and product innovation may drive long-term recovery in insurance.

news.title:
HDFC Life's board to meet on April 16, 2026, to approve Q4/FY26 results.
Trading window closed April 1-18, 2026, for insiders as per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
HDFC Life's board to meet on April 16, 2026, to approve Q4/FY26 results.

news.title:
Tata Steel invests ₹1,680.3 cr in T Steel Holdings; TVS Motor approves ₹12/share interim dividend.
HDFC Life faces ₹126.5 cr tax demand; NTPC Green signs MoU with Nxtra; Waaree plans ₹3,900 cr expansion.
news.summary:
Tata Steel invests ₹1,680.3 cr in T Steel Holdings; TVS Motor approves ₹12/share interim dividend.
HDFC Life faces ₹126.5 cr tax demand; NTPC Green signs MoU with Nxtra; Waaree plans ₹3,900 cr expansion.

news.title:
HDFC Life faces ₹126.46 cr tax demand plus ₹45.55 cr interest.
The company plans to challenge the order, citing no financial impact.
news.summary:
HDFC Life faces ₹126.46 cr tax demand plus ₹45.55 cr interest.
The company plans to challenge the order, citing no financial impact.

news.title: Morgan Stanley keeps Overweight rating on HDFC Life, revises target price to 840 from 875.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley keeps Overweight rating on HDFC Life, revises target price to 840 from 875.

news.title:
HDFC Life announces participation in Morgan Stanley Virtual India Financials Seminar on March 19, 2026.
Investor presentation for the event is hosted on HDFC Life's website; schedule subject to change.
